title: Craftable OP Apple
description: Makes the OP golden Apple craftable
body:
**Craftable OP Apple brings back the old recipe for the enchanted golden apple (“OP Apple”)!
In modern Minecraft versions, this powerful item is no longer craftable – but with this mod, you can make it yourself again!**

- Enchanted Golden Apple craftable once more 
- Recipe using gold blocks and a regular apple 
- Great for boss fights, PvP, and hardcore worlds 
- Simple, balanced, and mod-compatible 

**Get ready for epic battles – with the power of the OP Apple!**
